title: Sales Kickoff 2023
content:
GitLab SKO 2023 took place from February 13-17, 2023. The event was offered in a hybrid format to accommodate our team members around the world. To learn more about the event, see the Field Team FAQ document .

All SKO 2023 session recordings are now available! There are two ways to view all mainstage sessions, pre-recorded breakout sessions and supplemental videos:

Access the SKO 2023 page in Highspot

If you do not have access to Highspot, you can view the SKO 2023 Recordings Google Drive folder

Remember: All SKO 2023 content is SAFE and should not be downloaded or shared externally for any reason.
